Interface IClassSchemaEdit2

Namespace
ESRI.ArcGIS.Geodatabase
Assembly
ESRI.Server.Geodatabase.dll

Provides access to members that modify an object class's extension properties.

[Guid("62F1F470-E991-11D3-80D3-00C04F601565")]
[InterfaceType(ComInterfaceType.InterfaceIsIUnknown)]
public interface IClassSchemaEdit2 : IClassSchemaEdit
